title: AN ACT RENAMING THE FILIPINAS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN NICOLAS, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE, AS THE SAN NICOLAS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

chunks.text:
H. No. 23333 / 88 OG No. 25, 3891 (June 22, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7493, May 13, 1992 ]

AN ACT RENAMING THE FILIPINAS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN NICOLAS, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE, AS THE SAN NICOLAS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Filipinas National High School located in the Municipality of San Nicolas, Province of Ilocos Norte, is hereby renamed as the San Nicolas National High School.

SEC. 2. All allocations provided for the operation and maintenance of the Filipinas National High School shall be carried over to the San Nicolas National High School.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 23, 1991 and February 6, 1992, respectively,

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: May 13, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
